stemHtml: RADAR instructs aircraft X-BC:"X-BC squawk ident". What does this mean?

options.a: X-BC should perform an identification turn of at least 020 degrees.
options.b: X-BC shall reselect his assigned mode and code.
options.c: Radar identification has been achieved by correlating an observed radar blip with aircraft XY-ABC.
options.d: X-BC shall operate the IDENT button.
